mapper.select:
SELECT breed_name,breed_type,breed_type,suitable_housing,required_care_hours,suitable_experience, budget_level,shedding_degree,personality_type,breed_features,personality_traits,feeding_suggestions, health_attention,interaction_needs,budget_reference FROM cat_characteristic WHERE breed_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR breed_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR suitable_housing LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR required_care_hours LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR suitable_experience LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR budget_level LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR shedding_degree LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR personality_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR breed_features LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR personality_traits LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR feeding_suggestions LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR health_attention LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR interaction_needs LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%') OR budget_reference LIKE CONCAT('%', #{breedName}, '%')
LIMIT 10;
